emails.subject: Invitation - Wharton ET Events
emails.body: Mark, FYI. What about going to Wharton in October to attend the E-commerce conference? Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 08/18/2000 11:56 AM tomczyk@wharton.upenn.edu (Michael Tomczyk) on 08/15/2000 01:37:34 PM

emails.subject: Re: Invitation - Wharton ET Events
emails.body: Re: Invitation Wharton ET Events I agree. If you are going to send an RSVP, I suggest it be you, me, and Christie Patrick. If any of us drop out, we'll be able to fill the space. Mark
